title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
